data.title: BD has received FDA clearance for EnCor EnCompass™ Breast Biopsy System, expected to launch in early 2026.
data.description: A cutting-edge breast biopsy system that combines multiple modalities is expected to launch in early 2026. BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a renowned medical technology company, shared the news on Jan. 15, 2026, in Franklin Lakes, NJ. This innovative system, set to hit the market, is poised to revolutionize breast biopsies with advanced technology. Stay tuned for further updates on this development impacting the medical field.

data.title: Genesco in Nashville, Tenn., announces strategic transformation of IT operations for better efficiency and effectiveness.
data.description: Genesco, a leading company based in Nashville, Tennessee, has recently disclosed plans for a strategic overhaul of its information technology operations. This transformation aims to improve efficiency and effectiveness within the IT sector of the company. The specific details and extent of this transformation have not been fully revealed yet. This move is significant for Genesco as it seeks to modernize and streamline its IT operations to better serve its business needs. Further updates regarding this strategic change are anticipated in the near future.

data.title: Kinross is constructing Phase X, Curlew, and Redbird 2 projects to contribute 3 million ounces of production, with attractive NPV and IRR.
data.description: Contribution of 3 million ounces of production has been made, with improved grades and extended mine lives. All projects show appealing NPV and IRR at various gold price levels.

data.title: Bullish to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 5, 2026, with earnings call at 8:30 am ET. Live webcast available.
data.description: The Cayman Islands-based Bullish (NYSE: BLSH) digital asset platform catering to institutions revealed plans to unveil its Q4 2025 financial results on February 5, 2026. The earnings conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. For those interested, a live webcast of the call will be accessible on the Bullish Investor Relations website at investors.bullish.com.

data.title: FRP/GRP/GRE Pipes Market projected to reach $6.72 billion by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report from MarketsandMarkets revealed significant insights into the FRP/GRP/GRE Pipes Market. The study categorizes the market by type, including GRP, GRE, and others, with a focus on different glass fiber types like E-Glass, S-Glass, and others. The report also delves into various manufacturing processes such as filament winding and others. Interestingly, the market is segmented by diameter, with a particular emphasis on sizes exceeding 1200 mm. The study further explores the diverse end-use applications of FRP/GRP/GRE pipes in different industries.

data.title: Ferrari N.V. released their corporate calendar for 2026, with key dates yet to be disclosed.
data.description: Today, on January 15, 2026, in Maranello, Italy, Ferrari N.V. disclosed its corporate schedule for the year 2026. The company, listed on NYSE/EXM under the ticker symbol RACE, released this information.

data.title: Indian crypto firms advocate for tax reevaluation before February budget, citing liquidity drain from transaction taxes and loss restrictions.
data.description: Prominent figures in the industry are expressing concerns over the impact of transaction-level taxes and loss restrictions on liquidity as India intensifies its efforts to enforce stricter compliance measures in the cryptocurrency sector. This move has led to a significant decrease in trading volumes and investments, with reports indicating a substantial reduction of approximately 40% in transactions and a notable decline in overall market activity. The crypto community is closely monitoring the situation as the crackdown continues to affect the industry landscape in India.

data.title: Apogee Enterprises raises dividend to $0.27 per share, up 4% from $0.26. Payable on Feb 18, 2026, to shareholders as of Feb 3, 2026.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) disclosed a rise in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.27 per share, up 4% from the prior rate of $0.26 per share. Shareholders of record as of February 3, 2026, will receive the dividend on February 18, 2026. Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) is a prominent supplier of architectural building products.

data.title: Insteel Industries reports Q1 2026 results: $159.9M net sales, $18.1M gross profit, $19.4M special cash dividend paid.
data.description: Insteel Industries Inc. (NYSE: IIIN), a leading manufacturer of steel wire reinforcing products for concrete construction in the U.S., announced its first quarter fiscal results for 2026 as of December 27, 2025. The highlights from the quarter include a special cash dividend of $19.4 million ($1.00 per share), net sales reaching $159.9 million, and a gross profit of $18.1 million, equivalent to 11.3% of net sales.
